zh.Thornton, Cheshire, England: 英國英格蘭爾桑頓 馬福
zh.lifeSummary: 當Lord Randal Thornton於大約1206年出生在英國爾桑頓 馬福時，他的父親Peter Thornton53歲，母親Margaret Eynion53歲。他於1222年之前與Avice de Kingsely在英國結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1244年在英國爾桑頓 勒 波斯享年39歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lord Randal Thornton于大约1206年出生在英国爾桑頓 馬福时，他的父亲Peter Thornton53岁，母亲Margaret Eynion53岁。他于1222年之前与Avice de Kingsely在英国结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1244年在英国爾桑頓 勒 波斯享年39岁。

nameMeanings.name: Thornton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Scottish: habitational name from any of numerous places throughout England and Scotland so called, from Old English thorn ‘thorn tree’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’. The placename is most frequent in northern England, especially Yorkshire, where there are at least 16 possible sources for the surname.
Irish: Anglicized (translated) form of Gaelic Mac Sceacháin ‘son of Sceachán’ (see Skehan ).
Irish: shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Draighneáin ‘descendant of Draighneán’ (see Drennan ).

variants.name: Thornber
meanings: English: habitational name from any of the five minor places in Yorkshire called Thornber, particularly Thornber in Halton West. The placenames derive from Old English thorn ‘thorn’ + beorg ‘hill, mound’.
Irish: adopted for various Irish names containing an element meaning ‘thorn’; compare   Thornton  .

variants.name: Thorton
meanings: English: probably a shortened form of   Thornton  , or a habitational name from Thorton in Marnhull, Dorset, which has the same origin.

variants.name: Skehan
meanings: Irish: shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Sceacháin or Ó Sceacháin ‘son (or descendant) of Sceachán’, a personal name probably based on a diminutive of sceach ‘briar, thorn bush’. The Gaelic name has sometimes been ‘translated’ as Thornton .

nameMeanings.name: Randal
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Mainly U.S.: medieval vernacular form of   Randolf .  This was in common use as a given name into the 17th century and gave rise to a surname. In modern use the given name is often a transferred use of this surname.

variants.name: Randell
meanings: Mainly U.S.: medieval vernacular form of   Randolf .  This was in common use as a given name into the 17th century and gave rise to a surname. In modern use the given name is often a transferred use of this surname.

variants.name: Randle
meanings: Mainly U.S.: medieval vernacular form of   Randolf .  This was in common use as a given name into the 17th century and gave rise to a surname. In modern use the given name is often a transferred use of this surname.

variants.name: Randel
meanings: Mainly U.S.: medieval vernacular form of   Randolf .  This was in common use as a given name into the 17th century and gave rise to a surname. In modern use the given name is often a transferred use of this surname.

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

en.lifeSummary: When Lord Randal Thornton was born about 1206, in Thornton Mayow, Cheshire, England, his father, Peter Thornton, was 53 and his mother, Margaret Eynion, was 53. He married Avice de Kingsely before 1222, in England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 3 daughters. He died in 1244, in Thornton le Moors, Cheshire, England, at the age of 39.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lord Randal Thornton est né environ 1206, à Thornton Mayow, Cheshire, Angleterre, son père, Peter Thornton, avait 53 ans et sa mère, Margaret Eynion, avait 53 ans. Il a épousé Avice de Kingsely avant 1222, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé en 1244, à Thornton le Moors, Cheshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 39 ans.

Er hat vor 1222 in England Avice de Kingsely geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb 1244 im Alter von 39 Jahren in Thornton le Moors, Cheshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Lord Randal Thorntonが約1206年にイギリスチェシュアイアソルントン メイオウで生まれた時，父Peter Thorntonは53歳，母Margaret Eynionは53歳であった。1222年以前にイギリスでAvice de Kingselyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1244年にイギリスチェシュアイアソルントン ル ムールズで39歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Lord Randal Thornton(이)가 대략 1206년 영국 체실르 토른턴 메이요에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Peter Thornton(은)는 53세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret Eynion(은)는 53세였다. 그는 1222년 이전 영국에서 Avice de Kingsely(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1244년 영국 체실르 토른턴 일 무르스에서 39세의 나이로 사망했다.

Ele casou-se com Avice de Kingsely antes 1222, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1244, em Thornton le Moors, Cheshire, Inglaterra, com 39 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lord Randal Thornton родился около 1206 г. в местности таурнтон меиоу, чешир, Англия, его отцу по имени Peter Thornton было 53 года, а матери, которую звали Margaret Eynion, 53. Он женился на женщине по имени Avice de Kingsely перед 1222 г. в местности Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 3 дочери. Он умер в 1244 г. в местности таурнтон л мурс, чешир, Англия в возрасте 39 лет.
